result.stdout:
GitTagger.Cli v1.2.9

USAGE
  dotnet GitTagger.Cli.dll [options]
  dotnet GitTagger.Cli.dll [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Running wihout parameters will dry-run and show version for current commit

OPTIONS
  --path            Path to project/repository Default: ".".
  --release-branch  Mainline branch Default: "master".
  --develop-branch  Patch/work branch Default: "develop".
  --dirty-only      Run on dirty only. Useful for csproj gen Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  bump              Bump version with options 
  tag               Tags the repository with the current version 

You can run `dotnet GitTagger.Cli.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
GitTagger.Cli v1.2.9

USAGE
  dotnet GitTagger.Cli.dll tag [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Tags the repository with the current version

OPTIONS
  --label           Tag name 
  --clear           Removes a tag specified by the --label switch Default: "False".
  --clear-all       Clear all tags from repository Default: "False".
  --to-file         Output version info into file version.info Default: "False".
  --to-file-path    Custom file path for '--to-file' option 
  --to-csproj       Output version info into project file 
  --path            Path to project/repository Default: ".".
  --release-branch  Mainline branch Default: "master".
  --develop-branch  Patch/work branch Default: "develop".
  --dirty-only      Run on dirty only. Useful for csproj gen Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
GitTagger.Cli v1.2.9

USAGE
  dotnet GitTagger.Cli.dll tag [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Tags the repository with the current version

OPTIONS
  --label           Tag name 
  --clear           Removes a tag specified by the --label switch Default: "False".
  --clear-all       Clear all tags from repository Default: "False".
  --to-file         Output version info into file version.info Default: "False".
  --to-file-path    Custom file path for '--to-file' option 
  --to-csproj       Output version info into project file 
  --path            Path to project/repository Default: ".".
  --release-branch  Mainline branch Default: "master".
  --develop-branch  Patch/work branch Default: "develop".
  --dirty-only      Run on dirty only. Useful for csproj gen Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
